AccountSummary.description:
Account dimension row with identifiers masked server-side.

``iban_masked`` keeps only the last four characters
(``penge.web.mask.mask_iban``); the raw IBAN never leaves the API.
AccountSummary.title: AccountSummary

AllocationDimension.description: Grouping dimension for the current-allocation endpoint.
AllocationDimension.title: AllocationDimension

AllocationResponse.description: Current allocation snapshot grouped by one dimension.
AllocationResponse.title: AllocationResponse

AllocationSlice.title: AllocationSlice

AspspListResponse.description: The set of providers the deployment can connect to.
AspspListResponse.title: AspspListResponse

AuthorizeRequest.description: Exchange the redirect ``code`` for a stored session.

state.description: The ?state= value; binds the code to its pending connection.
state.title: State

AuthorizeRequest.title: AuthorizeRequest

BenchmarkInfo.description: One instrument with ingested price history, usable as benchmark.
BenchmarkInfo.title: BenchmarkInfo

BenchmarkPoint.description: One daily close of a benchmark instrument (native currency).
BenchmarkPoint.title: BenchmarkPoint

BenchmarkSeriesResponse.description: Paginated daily close series for one benchmark instrument.
BenchmarkSeriesResponse.title: BenchmarkSeriesResponse

CashflowPoint.description:
One account-day row of ``mart_cashflow_daily``.

Days without transactions produce no row; consumers treat absent
days as zero (same contract as the MCP ``query_cashflow`` tool).
CashflowPoint.title: CashflowPoint

CashflowSeriesResponse.description: Paginated cashflow series at account granularity.
CashflowSeriesResponse.title: CashflowSeriesResponse

CommitCountsOut.description: Rows written by a commit, in loader vocabulary.
CommitCountsOut.title: CommitCountsOut

ConnectionAccountOut.description: One authorised account on a connection (no raw uid leaks to logs).
ConnectionAccountOut.title: ConnectionAccountOut

ConnectionErrorOut.description: Sanitised debug payload for a failed link/authorize/sync.
ConnectionErrorOut.title: ConnectionErrorOut

ConnectionOut.description: A bank connection as exposed to the UI.
ConnectionOut.title: ConnectionOut

CurrencyReturnSummary.description:
TWR/MWR figures for one measurement currency.

``error`` carries a data-quality note when the series could not be
chain-linked faithfully; all figures are then ``None`` rather than
a fabricated number.
CurrencyReturnSummary.title: CurrencyReturnSummary

FeeYearRow.description:
Fees recorded for one account in one calendar year.

Sums explicit ``fee``-kind transactions plus the ``fee`` column on
trades, converted at the forward-filled ECB rate of the fee date.
FeeYearRow.title: FeeYearRow

FeesResponse.description: Yearly fee totals per account over one request window.
FeesResponse.title: FeesResponse

FreshnessResponse.description: Freshness metadata for every mart the API serves.
FreshnessResponse.title: FreshnessResponse

GroupBy.description: Aggregation level for the net-worth series.
GroupBy.title: GroupBy

ImportRowOut.description: One staged row of an import session.
ImportRowOut.title: ImportRowOut

ImportSessionListResponse.description: One page of import sessions, newest first.
ImportSessionListResponse.title: ImportSessionListResponse

ImportSessionOut.description: One import session without its rows.
ImportSessionOut.title: ImportSessionOut

ImportSessionWithRows.description: One import session plus one page of its rows.
ImportSessionWithRows.title: ImportSessionWithRows

LinkRequest.description: Start a consent for one provider.

entity_name.description: Canonical person the synced accounts belong to.
entity_name.title: Entity Name

provider.description: Penge provider slug: gls | ebank | lunar.
provider.title: Provider

LinkRequest.title: LinkRequest

LinkResponse.description: Where to send the browser to obtain consent.
LinkResponse.title: LinkResponse

MappingSuggestionOut.description: One AI mapping suggestion for one staged row (ADR-0038).
MappingSuggestionOut.title: MappingSuggestionOut

MartFreshness.description: Latest data date and row count for one mart.
MartFreshness.title: MartFreshness

NetWorthSeriesResponse.description: Paginated net-worth series at account granularity.
NetWorthSeriesResponse.title: NetWorthSeriesResponse

NetWorthTotalPoint.description: One day of the net-worth series summed across all accounts.
NetWorthTotalPoint.title: NetWorthTotalPoint

NetWorthTotalSeriesResponse.description: Net-worth series aggregated to one row per day.
NetWorthTotalSeriesResponse.title: NetWorthTotalSeriesResponse

ReturnsPoint.description:
One scope-day row of ``mart_returns_daily``.

The return factor follows the start-of-day flow convention
``end_mv / (begin_mv + net_flow)`` and is ``None`` on days without
capital at risk (ADR-0039).
ReturnsPoint.title: ReturnsPoint

ReturnsSeriesResponse.description: Paginated daily return-factor series for one scope.
ReturnsSeriesResponse.title: ReturnsSeriesResponse

ReturnsSummaryEntry.description: Chain-linked TWR and MWR for one scope key over the window.
ReturnsSummaryEntry.title: ReturnsSummaryEntry

ReturnsSummaryResponse.description: Per-scope-key return summaries over one request window.
ReturnsSummaryResponse.title: ReturnsSummaryResponse

RowCounts.description: Aggregated review state of a session's rows.
RowCounts.title: RowCounts

RowIssue.description: One validation or duplicate finding on a staged row.
RowIssue.title: RowIssue

RowPatchRequest.description: Corrections to one staged row before commit.
RowPatchRequest.title: RowPatchRequest

SuggestionSessionOut.description: Session echo returned by the MCP suggestion tool.
SuggestionSessionOut.title: SuggestionSessionOut

SuggestionsResponse.description: Mapping suggestions for one staged session, as returned by MCP.
SuggestionsResponse.title: SuggestionsResponse

info.description: Read-only JSON API over the Penge analytics marts. All amounts are reported in EUR and DKK in parallel; account identifiers are masked server-side. The /imports endpoints are the one write surface: staged import sessions per ADR-0037. The /connections endpoints add the in-app Enable Banking consent flow per ADR-0040 and are only active where the EB signing key is configured.
info.title: Penge read API

get.description: Account dimension with IBAN and name suffix masked server-side.
Latest-day allocation grouped by entity, currency, or account kind.
Instruments with ingested price history, usable as benchmarks.

Daily close series of one benchmark, in its native currency.

An unknown instrument id yields an empty series, not an error —
the UI treats it the same as "no prices in window".

parameters.description: First day of the window (inclusive). Default: one year ago.
parameters.name: since

schema.description: First day of the window (inclusive). Default: one year ago.
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.
parameters.name: until

schema.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.
schema.title: Until

get.description: Daily cashflow series per account (absent days mean zero).

parameters.description: First day of the window (inclusive). Default: one year ago.
parameters.name: since

schema.title: Since

parameters.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.
parameters.name: until

schema.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.

get.description: List every bank connection with its status and last-sync debug info.
List the Enable Banking ASPSPs this deployment can connect to.

post.description: Exchange the redirect code for a stored session.
Start a consent and return the bank's consent URL.
Pull transactions + balances for one connection into Postgres.
Upload one statement, parse it, and stage its rows for review.

delete.description: Discard a staged (or expired) session and delete its stored file.

get.description: Return one session with one page of its staged rows.

post.description: Write all included rows to the raw tables via the loaders.

patch.description: Correct, exclude, or re-map one staged row before commit.

post.description:
Ask the MCP suggestion tool for mapping proposals (ADR-0038).

The API only proxies: the deterministic rules live in the MCP
server, which is the sole sanctioned LLM/AI data path. Returns 503
when no MCP command is configured or the server is unreachable,
502 when the tool itself rejects the call.

get.description: Latest data date and row count per mart, for staleness banners.
Daily net-worth series, per account or summed per day.

parameters.name: since

schema.title: Since

parameters.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.
parameters.name: until

schema.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.
schema.title: Until

get.description:
Chain-linked TWR and MWR per scope key over the window.

Computation runs server-side through ``penge.analytics.returns``
so the UI and any other client see identical figures. A scope key
whose series cannot be chain-linked faithfully reports an ``error``
note instead of a number.

parameters.description: First day of the window (inclusive). Default: one year ago.
parameters.name: since

schema.description: First day of the window (inclusive). Default: one year ago.
schema.title: Since

parameters.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.
parameters.name: until

schema.description: Last day of the window (inclusive). Default: today.
schema.title: Until
